title: phyllanthus jaffrei
intro: Phyllanthus jaffrei, also known as the 'Brousse tree' or 'Guette tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus jaffrei include its ability to support liver health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various respiratory infections. Traditionally, Phyllanthus jaffrei is used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
